productName: Second Nature Infused Pre-roll BOTTOMLESS MIMOSA BOMBER - 5g
description: Ready-to-spark hybrid infused pre-roll of Bottomless Mimosa, enhanced with concentrate for smoother, slower burning and a serious step up in strength. Built for a stronger, longer session and more intense effects — a balanced, sweet-earthy profile, with an even, best-of-both-worlds feel. A little goes a long way.
